_comment: Multi-project Playwright JSON: ONE spec run under two projects (browsers). tests[] holds one entry PER PROJECT; results[] are retries WITHIN a project. chromium passed, firefox failed -> the spec is FAILED (Playwright's own exit is non-zero). Proves the reader reduces each project then combines FAIL-CLOSED (any project fail -> executed=fail), not the false-green 'any result passed anywhere -> pass'.
